sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcFormResponseId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.Note
,ap.isBehavior
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.hcFormGraphTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphViewTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphFrequencyTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphDurationTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphCalculationTypeId
,ap.GoalStatus
,ap.hcFormGraphMaintenanceTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphMaintenanceViewTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphMaintenanceFrequencyTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphMaintenanceDurationTypeId
,ap.hcFormGraphMaintenanceCalculationTypeId
,ap.lessonMaintenanceGraphIncluded
,ap.UseBaselineDatesFilter
,ap.GraphTargetDisplay
,ap.GraphTargetPerRow
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcFormResponse fr on (hcFormResponseId=fr.id)
inner join  dbo.hcForm hf on (hcFormid=hf.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcFormResponseLessonNotes t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select    --ap.* 
ap.HcFormResponseId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcFormResponse fr on (hcFormResponseId=fr.id)
inner join  dbo.hcForm hf on (hcFormid=hf.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcFormResponseLessonsExcluded t2 on t1.HcFormResponseId = t2.HcFormResponseId AND t1.LessonId = t2.LessonId
WHERE t2.HcFormResponseId IS NULL AND t2.LessonId IS NULL
select HcFormResponseId,LessonId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.*
ap.Id
,ap.AssignedMemberId
,ap.[Status]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.AssignedmemberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcFormResponseRemoteSignatureRequest t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select    --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcFormId
,ap.name
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.Memberid
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.hcServiceId
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.sessionnoteRecordInd
,ap.IsAutoSave
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.Status
,ap.RemoteSignatureRequestId
,ap.responseStorageId
,ap.SelectedFunderId
,ap.hasAISummary
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  dbo.hcForm hf on (hcFormid=hf.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcFormResponse t2 on t1.id = t2.id 
WHERE t2.id IS NULL
select ID from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.isActive
,ap.isDefault
,ap.hcFunderId
,ap.hcFormTypeId
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.[Status]
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join  AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.AccountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcForm t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select
ap.Id,
ap.FunderId,
ap.DateCreated,
ap.DateLastModified,
ap.DateDeleted,
--ap.passAssignedClientLocation,
ap.BypassServiceLine,
ap.BypassServiceName
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join hcfunder hf on (hf.id=ap.FunderId   )
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcFunderSessionNoteExceptions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select
ap.id
,ap.funderName
,ap.phone
,ap.fax
,ap.emailAddress
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.AddressId
,ap.description
,ap.isActive
,ap.hcFunderTypeId
,ap.VendorId
,ap.Note
,ap.BillingCombineCharges
,ap.AppointmentDuplicateClientTimeAlertId
,ap.AppointmentDuplicateClientTimeServiceAlertId
,ap.AppointmentMissingBillingDataAlertId
,ap.AppointmentExceedingAuthorizationAlertId
,ap.hcProviderLocationId
,ap.hcFunderCoverageTypeId
,ap.KareoInsuranceCompanyId
,ap.hcCombineChargeTypeId
,ap.ClearingHousePayerId
,ap.AllowOverlappingAppointments
,ap.AppointmentExpiredCertificationAlertId

)t1
left join Temp_hcFunder t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.ID
,ap.StaffMemberId
,ap.EffectiveDate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.RelockedToDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.staffmemberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.staffmemberId  =p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcGlobalLockStaffException t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.ID
,ap.CompanyAccountId
,ap.GlobalLockDate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.CompanyaccountId  )
WHERE a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcGlobalLock t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
Where t2.Id is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
ap.ID
,ap.CompanyAccountId
,ap.Description
,ap.LongDescription
,ap.IsActive
,ap.MemberType
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON ap.companyAccountId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcNoteType t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select * from (select --ap.* 
ap.ID
,ap.StaffId
,ap.ClientId
,ap.NoteTypeId
,ap.Title
,ap.NoteDetails
,ap.IsPrivate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
			 inner join childprofile b on (b.id=ap.clientid)
			 inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (b.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where ap.clientid is not null
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

union 
select --ap.* 
ap.ID
,ap.StaffId
,ap.ClientId
,ap.NoteTypeId
,ap.Title
,ap.NoteDetails
,ap.IsPrivate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
  inner join hcstaffmember b on (b.id=ap.staffid)
  inner join dbo.tblmember tm on  (tm.id =b.tblmemberId    )  
  inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where ap.staffid  is not null
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)a
)t1
left join Temp_hcNote t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

,ap.IsActiveOverTime2

,ap.StartOverTimeByDay2
,ap.StartOverTimeByWeek1
,ap.StartOverTimeByWeek2
,ap.StartOverTimeBy7Day1
,ap.StartOverTimeBy7Day2
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.WorkweekId
,ap.WorkweekLastChange
,ap.DeletedBy

inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.*  
ap.id
,ap.EncryptedFirstName
,ap.EncryptedLastName
,ap.Phone
,ap.Fax

,ap.FirstName
,ap.LastName

,ap.Phone2
,ap.Phone3
,ap.SMSPhone

from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcChildProfileContacts tm on (tm.personid =ap.id    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (tm.ChildProfileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcPerson t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[description]
,ap.code
,ap.isActive
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.createdBy
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.modifiedBy
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcPlaceOfService t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.AuthorizationNumber
,ap.hcChildProfileDiagnosisId
,ap.hcAuthorizationRenderingProviderTypeId
,ap.RenderingProviderStaffId
,ap.NoOfUnits
,ap.SchedulingGoalNoOfUnits
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DiagnosisLUId
,ap.EndDate
,ap.hcChildProfileAuthorizationId
,ap.hcChildProfileReferringProviderId
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
	    inner join  dbo.hcChildProfileAuthorization cp  on (ap.hcChildProfileAuthorizationId=cp.id )
		inner join ChildProfile p on (cp.childprofileid=p.id ) 
        inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=p.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcPropagatingChildProfileAuthorization t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.relationshipToInsured
,ap.FirstName
,ap.LastName
,ap.Phone
,ap.Street1
,ap.City
,ap.StateId
,ap.Zip

						--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id )

where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
